title: ASR Outdoor Extendable Marshmallow Toaster Telescoping BBQ Fork Camping Utensil
description:
Toast marshmallows easily with the ASR Outdoor Telescoping BBQ Fork! The fork features 2 prongs for skewering meat, veggies and just about anything else you want to grill. Each fork extends to 35.5", making it the perfect length for keeping you away from the heat. Since marshmallows are notoriously hard to cook, the fork will help you keep your hands mess-free. It's perfect for children and adults alike! Make sure to grab a few of these before your next camping trip!
